Charges: Unlimited
AC: 21
Effect: Agilmente's Aria of Eagles (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 3.5) at Level 45
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

AC: 21

Rarity: Rare

a drolvarg bodyguard
a drolvarg guardian

Extra Mob
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2021 at 3:57 PM Rating: Good
Cherriblossom
1 post
Dropped of a Drolvarg Sentry on Aradune today. Perhaps a zone-wide rare? Definitely VERY rare.
▲ Page top
Good Lord
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2009 at 8:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593375035899
532 posts
I have been here 18 hours and counting, killing every Drolvarg in the zone as they spawn, and have not even seen a hint of these. I have gotten virtually every other drop you can get in the zone, including all the other class armor drops AND a Tranquil Staff. This has honestly been almost my longest camp ever only second to raster...

Liveye (lvl 70 Wizard)

I got these off the 4th mob that I killed tonight.

It was a Drolvarg Guardian just on the left past the first bridge.

Inventory clickable
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2003 at 2:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258647715
227 posts
Can this be clicked in inventory by a non-bard class?
▲ Page top
RE: Inventory clickable
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2004 at 7:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
They have to be worn to be clicked, buttercup.

And why would the point of making them Bard-only be if other classes could do that?
▲ Page top
cool boots
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2003 at 4:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787940893
1 post
i got a pear of these.cool boots =)
▲ Page top
Clickable at 45, does NOT require a Wind instrument
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2003 at 9:56 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762961599
Scholar
40 posts
> At what level can you use the right
> click effect? Thanks.

As mentioned below, you can right-click this if you're level 45.

These do NOT require the use of a Wind instrument, nor does actually singing the song Aria of Eagles.

You CAN activate this effect and then sing Selos. As mentioned, these boots are a great way to remove the need to twist if just traveling.

Personally, I'll be carrying these even when I'm no longer wearing them. I don't need the rest of the effects of the SS armor, and the combined stats of other full sets are better anyway (currently gunning for Bravado (Twilight Sea), mostly in the Bazaar :) )
▲ Page top
RE: Clickable at 45, does NOT require a Wind instrument
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2003 at 10:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758433518
Scholar
160 posts
Aye once you get Selo's Song of Travel, these boots are a great way to NOT kill people when carrying them over mountainous regions. Just click em before you head off and no more 10k falls for your passengers =)
▲ Page top
can you twist selos with this
QuoteReply

__DEL__1591780910484
31 posts

# Feb 14 2002 at 9:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770841424
Scholar
240 posts
I looted a pair of SS boots in KC, and have no personal use for them. I will let them go to a bard in need for a reasonable price. Send me a tell on the E'ci server, if you would like a pair.
Good Hunting.

Skulreaver Swiftblade
53 Pathfinder E'ci
-Dualwielder Extrordinaire-

Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 12:23 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Agilmente`s Aria of Eagles
Levitate


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Brd (L31)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Song requires a Flute

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Wind Instruments
Allowable Targets: Full Group

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Area Effect Range: 80 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: 3 ticks (18 seconds)
Duration Formula: 7
Casting Time: 3.0 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: The aria lifts you into the air.
Spell fades: You stop floating.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello All,

The new (re-updated) proc seems to be a ~5 min group lev buff. Very handy for sub-51 bards traviling in the dreadlands or other steep/hilly areas.

▲ Page top
new effect
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2001 at 8:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752191797
Scholar
198 posts
The proc starts at level 45. The new proc as of the patch is levitate song (Agilmente's Aria of Eagles) except it is self (possible group, I only know it isn't targetable and only played my bard long enough to see how worthless the new proc was so I never got in a group) only, lasts a little longer than the song of the same name, can't be procced while singing, has same casting time as all the bard songs, doesn't last nearly as long as any levitate spell that casters get. I almost liked summon water better, I'd call this a nerf but going from one worthless proc to another isn't really a step down...
▲ Page top
NEW PROC AS OF LATEST PATCH(3/27/01)
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2001 at 12:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248099055
8 posts
As of the latest patch, 3/27/01, the proc has been changed from Summon Water to the level 31 levitate song. One less song to twist for me I suppose. Still bummed it only procs at 45. =(

# Jan 22 2001 at 4:11 AM Rating: Decent

20 posts
If memory serves the boots started producing water at level 45. Prior to that you get the 'you're not high enough to use this item' spam.
▲ Page top
RE: Effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2001 at 3:51 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
All Kunark class specific armor start to activate at level 45. Once you reach 45 you gain this ever so powerful spell effect.
